title: The Beast OTGW
description: Mod Based on the work Over The Garden Wall.
body:
# The Beast
## About the Mod.
Mod. Based on the animated miniseries Over the Garden Wall.
It tells the story of two brothers who get lost in a mysterious forest and try to find their way back home.

## Objective
Your objective in this adventure is to kill the beast and its cultists, thus saving the world from this creature.

## V0.0.2
We are currently on version 0.0.2 of the Mod. And we don't have much content.
Here's everything we have. 

### Mobs

* A Beast
* Cultists

### Weapons

* Shotgun

### Items

* 1 Discs
* 1 Pictures
* 3 Enchantments

## Commands

Above all, Quoted Above We care about happiness when creating Content.
Thus adding several Commands to the Game That Serve to Increase Spawn Speed ​​or Even Removing the Limit of Beasts That Can Spawn



# Extra

We have little content so far, but keep in mind that this is just a test project.


Good luck.
